ip_outcome_note: Card name explicitly reads 'Gaetan Moliere' and the subtitle 'Clever Burrower' directly references his canonical role as the expedition's geologist/excavation expert in Atlantis: The Lost Empire (2001), nicknamed 'Mole' for his obsessive relationship with soil and underground spaces. The art depicts the round goggles, headlamp, and dirt-holding pose that are signature visual identifiers for this character. Listed under the Atlantis: The Lost Empire franchise in Lorcana databases. Internal Disney IP within the Lorcana license.

trivia_bullets.text: Gaetan Moliere's character design originated as 'professorial' but story artist Chris Ure reworked the concept into 'a horrible little burrowing creature with a wacky coat and strange headgear with extending eyeballs.' [Disney Wiki: Gaetan Moliere] The Lorcana card's UNEARTH ability — 'draw 2 cards, then discard 2' — mechanically echoes Mole's function in the film: he surfaces information (geological data) while remaining selective about what he processes, and Evasive reflects his tendency to slip out of view underground.

Gaetan Moliere is one of multiple named Atlantis expedition crew members represented in Wilds Unknown (set 12, released May 15, 2026), alongside Preston Whitmore, Milo Thatch, Kida, and The Leviathan. The set is the first in Lorcana history to feature Pixar characters, making the Atlantis cluster part of a landmark expansion. [Ravensburger/disneylorcana.com: Wilds Unknown press release; MushurePort.com: Atlantis gang article]
sources: MushurePort.com: Milo, Kida and the Atlantis gang article

trivia_bullets.text: Gaetan 'Mole' Moliere is voiced by Corey Burton in Atlantis: The Lost Empire (2001) and its direct-to-video sequel Atlantis: Milo's Return (2003). Mark Hamill auditioned for the role and was seriously considered before Burton was selected. Mole has no flavor text on his Lorcana card; the card relies solely on the oracle abilities to carry his character voice. [BehindTheVoiceActors.com: Gaetan Moliere; Tammy Tuckey interview with Corey Burton]
sources: Tammy Tuckey Show: Corey Burton 15th anniversary interview

trivia_bullets.text: At 4 cost Uncommon, Gaetan Moliere - Clever Burrower carries both Evasive and UNEARTH (draw 2, discard 2 on quest), making him a consistent card-selection engine. Evasive on a non-legendary uncommon at this cost tier is relatively rare in Lorcana, suggesting Mole's underground mobility was a deliberate design decision to reflect his burrowing lore. [LorcanaJSON card data]
